name: How to Get Your Employer to Pay for Hearing Aids

step.name: Step 1
step.text: Getting hearing aids through workers' comp starts with an official audiogram from a specialist. Don't rely on the quick screening your job provides; get an independent evaluation. You must show the loss happened due to cumulative noise at work. If the insurance adjuster keeps 'forgetting' to authorize your devices, give us a call at 801-746-0290. We’ll help you cut through the red tape.

description: How to Get Your Employer to Pay for Hearing Aids - Boise, West Valley City, West Jordan, Sandy, Murray, Millcreek, South Salt Lake, North Salt Lake, Bountiful, Midvale, Taylorsville, Cottonwood Heights, Holladay, Draper, Riverton, Farmington, Centerville
